testcase.name: Return org service details by ccd service name200

Returns launch darkly forbidden when delete minimal pending organisation with invalid flag

Return org service details by ccd service name not found404

Return org service details by ccd service name all200
Return org service details by ccd case type ignore case code200
Do not return org service details by unknown service code 404
